hero.title: Vẽenemã
hero.lead: IATF tʋʋmda zãma wã pʋgẽ sẽn nan yɩll tɩ b tõog n bãng b sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga.

header.title: B sẽn be zĩig ning n bĩngd kibayã

items: B yãkda b sẽn na n maan bũmb ningã. B sã n wa sak n deeg-a, n bĩng-a la b lebs n ning-a zĩig a to, b gʋlsd-a-la b sẽn yiis-a to-to wã pʋgẽ, la b sõdg-a zãma wã sebr pʋgẽ. Bãngr-goamaYaa woto la a maan-yã .

Kos-y sɛbã. Sebr ning b sẽn boond tɩ IATF GitHub wã pʋgẽ, yaa seb-kãngã zugu, bɩ a yiibã fãa pʋgẽ. Sebrã tõe n sõdga, n toeem bɩ n lebs n lugl pipi kosgã sẽn na yɩl tɩ b tõog n ges b sẽn dat n maan bũmb ningã, n pa wilg ned ning sẽn dat-a wã. B sã n wa yãk yam n na n maan bũmbu, b sõdgd-a-la seb-kãnga pʋgẽ, la b sã n maan-a t'a pa kẽed ne tʋʋmde, bɩ b yãk b sẽn da rat n maan a pʋgẽ.
Koodã toeeme. Koodã sẽn toeemd fãa yaa zãma wã pʋlemd sẽn tɩ loe ne b bĩngr zĩigẽ wã. Ges IATF GitHub siglgYaa woto la a maan-yã .
B toeema goosneema wã. Sebr ning sẽn gomd goosneema wã yel-manesem yelle, b get-a-la b sẽn maand to-to wã. iatf-website Yãk-y n tool-y neda b sẽn maan-a to-to wã GitHub pʋgẽ.
Tʋʋmdã ligdã. Sẽn sɩng ne yʋʋm 2022 soabã, ligd ning fãa b sẽn dɩkd n maandã yaa b sẽn boond tɩ "domain names" wã.
Gʋls-y y sẽn tõe n maan to-to. Gʋls-y sẽn kẽed ne vaeesg bɩ yam-yãkr ning fãa b sẽn maan tɩ zems GitHub pʋgẽ Ges-y Sõssã sõsg B sẽn na n maan to-to iatf-website Gʋls-y-yã-a n gese.

paragraphs: Sẽn sɩng ne yʋʋm 2022 soabã, tʋʋm-no-kãsems nins b sẽn maand wakat fãa wã yaa b sẽn boond tɩ "domain names" wã.
Seb-kãngã pa kɩbay b sẽn ges n bãngã ye. Yaa seb-vãoog b sẽn gʋls sẽn na yɩl n wilg tʋʋm nins b sẽn tʋmd tɩ IATF tõe n ket n tʋmdẽ wã.
operatingCosts.footnote: B tõe n gesa sɛb nins b sẽn yiisdã, wall b yiis-b-la b sẽn wa n yiis sɛbã to-to wã poore.

items.label: Sebr a yiib-n-soaba
items.value: Zĩigã ligdã yaa mugiwarafx n kõ. Zĩ-gũudã ra tũnugda ne Cloudflare n kõt ligd sẽn yaa zaalem bɩ sẽn yaa ligd sẽn paood wʋsgo. Tʋʋmdã yii Vercel n kẽe CloudFlare la a sɩngame n tũnugd ne ligdã sẽn yaa kɩdma iatf.cc Bõn-naandga.

items.label: Sebr a yiib-n-soaba
items.value: A mugiwarafx n yao domenã ligdi. A zãadame tɩ b tõe n kõ-a-la zaalem bɩ ligd sẽn pa waooge.

items.label: Sebr a yiib-n-soaba
items.value: Zĩ-kãng ligd yaa mugiwarafx n kõ-a.

items.label: Sebr a yiib-n-soaba
items.value: A mugiwarafx n yao domenã ligdi. A zãadame tɩ b tõe n kõ-a-la zaalem bɩ ligd sẽn pa waooge.

items.label: Sebr a yiib-n-soaba
items.value: Zĩ-kãng ligd yaa mugiwarafx n kõ-a.

header.kicker: Bãngr-gomd sẽn wilgd b sẽn segd n maan to-to
header.title: Bũmb ning sẽn pa zãma wã

paragraphs: Seb-kãens kẽer pa be sɛb nins nebã sẽn tõe n yã wã pʋgẽ, n na n sõng-b tɩ b bãng bũmb ning sẽn kɩt tɩ b maand woto wã ye.
items: Y sẽn tõe n paam n tɩ yẽs ne neb nins sẽn dat n maan b yam-yãkrã to-to.
Yaa lɛtr b sẽn gʋls ne neb a taab sẽn na yɩl bal n wilg bũmb ning b sẽn dat tɩ b maan n yaool n sak n deeg-a, n zãgs-a wall b sõdg-a.
Adrɛs-rãmb la telefõn-rãmba, la yɛl a taab sẽn pa tɩlae.
Bũmb ning fãa sẽn tõe n kɩt tɩ b bãng ned ning sẽn tũnugd ne bũmb ning sẽn sõngd-a wã n pa sak n deeg tɩ b maan woto wã.
Raw Discord sõssã, sã n ka b sẽn tʋll n tall koɛɛg sẽn yaa takɩ n tall n kẽng porze wã sebr sẽn be neba fãa sʋka.

header.title: Soog-m-mengã yaa noy nins sẽn be seb-kãensã poorẽ wã

paragraphs: Y sã n dat n bãng b sẽn deegd tʋʋm-noy to-to, b sẽn bĩngd-b zĩig ninga, bɩ b sẽn lebgd-b zĩis a taabã, bɩ y karem goosneema wã sebre.
